plugins/agent-plugin-analyzer/scripts/an.summary: Plugin ecosystem script auditor. Scans all plugins/ directories for Python script references in .md files, identifies which are physically present vs referenced but missing, and validates symlink structures against ADR-001 (no cross-plugin script execution - use skill delegation) and ADR-002 (multi-skill scripts live at plugin root with symlinks in skills). Loads whitelist.json to suppress known false positives. Writes full analysis to analysis_results.txt with per-plugin sections and a global summary of unresolved missing scripts. CLI: python3 analyze_scripts.py > analysis_results.txt. No arguments needed - reads whitelist.json from same directory.

plugins/context-bundler/scripts/bundle.p.summary: Markdown Context Bundler Engine. Reads a JSON manifest (title, description, files[]) and concatenates file contents into a single annotated Markdown file for LLM ingestion or external review. Expands directory paths recursively. Infers language for fenced code blocks (md, py, json, ts, js). Inserts a WARNING placeholder for missing/unreadable files instead of aborting. CLI: python3 bundle.py --manifest <path/to/manifest.json> --bundle <output.md>. Manifest schema: {title, description, files: [{path, note}]}. Outputs index + per-file sections with code fences.

plugins/context-bundler/scripts/bundle_z.summary: ZIP Context Bundler Engine. Reads a JSON manifest and archives native-format files into a .zip using ZIP_DEFLATED compression. Auto-generates a _manifest_notes.md root file inside the archive containing the index and LLM-provided note annotations. Expands directory paths recursively while skipping __pycache__, node_modules, .env files. Flags missing files in _manifest_notes.md without aborting. CLI: python3 bundle_zip.py --manifest <path/to/manifest.json> --bundle <output.zip>. Same manifest schema as bundle.py. Use this instead of bundle.py when distributing native-format files.

plugins/rlm-factory/scripts/cleanup_cach.summary: RLM Cache Cleanup. Prunes three categories of bad entries from the RLM semantic ledger cache: (1) stale - source file deleted from disk, (2) failed - summary is sentinel [DISTILLATION FAILED], (3) orphan - file exists but is outside the profile manifest scope. Defaults to dry-run; requires --apply to write changes. Exposes remove_entry(profile, file_path) as a programmatic API for single-entry removal. CLI: python3 cleanup_cache.py --profile <tools|project> [--apply] [--prune-orphans] [--prune-failed] [--v]. Uses fcntl.flock via save_cache() for safe concurrent writes.

plugins/rlm-factory/scripts/inventory.py.summary: RLM Inventory Auditor. Compares the RLM semantic cache (rlm_tool_cache.json or rlm_summary_cache.json) against the live filesystem to produce a coverage gap report. Identifies: (1) files on disk not yet in cache (missing), (2) cache entries whose source files were deleted (stale). Exports an actionable Markdown checklist of inject_summary.py commands for each missing file. Uses rlm_config.py for manifest traversal and file collection. CLI: python3 inventory.py --profile <tools|project> [--full] [--tasks]. --full shows complete lists without truncation. --tasks exports rlm_distill_tasks_<profile>.md with pre-filled inject commands.
